name: eq操作符-字符串相等
setup: INSERT INTO mql_test_user (id, name, age, login_name, tenant_code) VALUES (1, '张三', 25, 'zhangsan', 'test')
INSERT INTO mql_test_user (id, name, age, login_name, tenant_code) VALUES (2, '李四', 30, 'lisi', 'test')
teardown: DELETE FROM mql_test_user WHERE id IN (1,2)
description: eq应生成参数化SQL并精确匹配

name: neq操作符-不等于
setup: INSERT INTO mql_test_user (id, name, age, login_name, tenant_code) VALUES (1, '张三', 25, 'a', 'test')
INSERT INTO mql_test_user (id, name, age, login_name, tenant_code) VALUES (2, '李四', 30, 'b', 'test')
teardown: DELETE FROM mql_test_user WHERE id IN (1,2)

name: lt操作符-小于
setup: INSERT INTO mql_test_user (id, name, age, login_name, tenant_code) VALUES (1, '张三', 25, 'a', 'test')
INSERT INTO mql_test_user (id, name, age, login_name, tenant_code) VALUES (2, '李四', 30, 'b', 'test')
teardown: DELETE FROM mql_test_user WHERE id IN (1,2)

name: lte操作符-小于等于
setup: INSERT INTO mql_test_user (id, name, age, login_name, tenant_code) VALUES (1, '张三', 25, 'a', 'test')
INSERT INTO mql_test_user (id, name, age, login_name, tenant_code) VALUES (2, '李四', 30, 'b', 'test')
teardown: DELETE FROM mql_test_user WHERE id IN (1,2)

name: gt操作符-大于
setup: INSERT INTO mql_test_user (id, name, age, login_name, tenant_code) VALUES (1, '张三', 25, 'a', 'test')
INSERT INTO mql_test_user (id, name, age, login_name, tenant_code) VALUES (2, '李四', 30, 'b', 'test')
teardown: DELETE FROM mql_test_user WHERE id IN (1,2)

name: gte操作符-大于等于
setup: INSERT INTO mql_test_user (id, name, age, login_name, tenant_code) VALUES (1, '张三', 25, 'a', 'test')
INSERT INTO mql_test_user (id, name, age, login_name, tenant_code) VALUES (2, '李四', 30, 'b', 'test')
teardown: DELETE FROM mql_test_user WHERE id IN (1,2)

name: startwith操作符-前缀匹配
setup: INSERT INTO mql_test_user (id, name, age, login_name, tenant_code) VALUES (1, '张三', 25, 'a', 'test')
INSERT INTO mql_test_user (id, name, age, login_name, tenant_code) VALUES (2, '李四', 30, 'b', 'test')
teardown: DELETE FROM mql_test_user WHERE id IN (1,2)

name: endwith操作符-后缀匹配
setup: INSERT INTO mql_test_user (id, name, age, login_name, tenant_code) VALUES (1, '张三', 25, 'a', 'test')
INSERT INTO mql_test_user (id, name, age, login_name, tenant_code) VALUES (2, '李四', 30, 'b', 'test')
teardown: DELETE FROM mql_test_user WHERE id IN (1,2)

name: contains操作符-包含
setup: INSERT INTO mql_test_user (id, name, age, login_name, tenant_code) VALUES (1, '张三丰', 25, 'a', 'test')
INSERT INTO mql_test_user (id, name, age, login_name, tenant_code) VALUES (2, '李四', 30, 'b', 'test')
teardown: DELETE FROM mql_test_user WHERE id IN (1,2)

name: in操作符-集合包含
setup: INSERT INTO mql_test_user (id, name, age, login_name, tenant_code) VALUES (1, '张三', 25, 'a', 'test')
INSERT INTO mql_test_user (id, name, age, login_name, tenant_code) VALUES (2, '李四', 30, 'b', 'test')
INSERT INTO mql_test_user (id, name, age, login_name, tenant_code) VALUES (3, '王五', 28, 'c', 'test')
teardown: DELETE FROM mql_test_user WHERE id IN (1,2,3)

name: nin操作符-集合排除
setup: INSERT INTO mql_test_user (id, name, age, login_name, tenant_code) VALUES (1, '张三', 25, 'a', 'test')
INSERT INTO mql_test_user (id, name, age, login_name, tenant_code) VALUES (2, '李四', 30, 'b', 'test')
teardown: DELETE FROM mql_test_user WHERE id IN (1,2)

name: nil操作符-为空(IS NULL)
setup: INSERT INTO mql_test_user (id, name, age, login_name, tenant_code) VALUES (1, '无邮箱', 20, 'a', 'test')
teardown: DELETE FROM mql_test_user WHERE id IN (1)

name: nil操作符-非空(IS NOT NULL)
setup: INSERT INTO mql_test_user (id, name, age, login_name, email, tenant_code) VALUES (1, '有邮箱', 20, 'a', 'a@b.com', 'test')
teardown: DELETE FROM mql_test_user WHERE id IN (1)

name: bt操作符-区间(between)
setup: INSERT INTO mql_test_user (id, name, age, login_name, tenant_code) VALUES (1, '张三', 25, 'a', 'test')
INSERT INTO mql_test_user (id, name, age, login_name, tenant_code) VALUES (2, '李四', 30, 'b', 'test')
INSERT INTO mql_test_user (id, name, age, login_name, tenant_code) VALUES (3, '王五', 40, 'c', 'test')
teardown: DELETE FROM mql_test_user WHERE id IN (1,2,3)
